name: Cascade Creek Mini Golf and Golf Simulator by Trackman
address: 2250 Big Thompson Ave, Estes Park, CO 80517
about: Cascade Creek Mini Golf and Golf Simulator by Trackman is a family entertainment center in Estes Park, Colorado, that offers a state-of-the-art golf simulator experience alongside a variety of other attractions. It is situated just east of Lake Estes along the Big Thompson River, providing mountain views and ample parking. The venue operates year-round, with its golf simulator and mini-golf open all winter and bookable online. The facility is part of a larger entertainment complex that includes go-karts, bumper boats, batting cages, and an arcade, making it a versatile destination for various activities. The venue is locally owned and operated, continuing a family legacy of providing entertainment for tourists, groups, and locals alike. Its golf simulator technology allows for practice and play regardless of weather conditions, appealing to those looking for a golf experience in a mountain setting.
why_golfers_like_it: Open all winter for year-round play
State-of-the-art Trackman technology for accurate simulation
Over 300 courses available for various skill levels
Located in a scenic mountain setting

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food service available.
No information on alcohol service available.

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch monitor with over 300 courses available.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether club rentals are available, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs for the golf simulator experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of outside food or drink policies on the website, so it is advisable to contact the venue directly for clarification.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take on the simulator?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific timing for an 18-hole round, but it is bookable by the hour, so the duration may depend on the package selected.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Cascade Creek Mini Golf and Golf Simulator is part of a larger family entertainment center with activities like mini-golf, go-karts, and an arcade, making it suitable for children.
